case_title: TAINA SIMU VS. ELLA JEAN GILMORE

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF APR-11-2017 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF SIMU, TAINA IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT GILMORE, ELLA JEAN DBA WOMACK ACADEMY STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $10,000.00 FILED BY SIMU, TAINA AS TO DEFENDANT GILMORE, ELLA JEAN DBA WOMACK ACADEMY ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR FEB-07-2017 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF SIMU, TAINA AS TO DEFENDANT GILMORE, ELLA JEAN DBA WOMACK ACADEMY
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FEE FOR SERVICE: $59.00 SERVED MAR-18-2017, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT GILMORE, ELLA JEAN DBA WOMACK ACADEMY
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF PER U.S. POSTAL SERVICE, "UNCLAIMED." COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED UNSERVED AS TO DEFENDANT GILMORE, ELLA JEAN DBA WOMACK ACADEMY
DECLARATION RE REQUEST TO APPEAR AT HEARING BY TELEPHONE (SMALL CLAIMS) FILED BY PLAINTIFF SIMU, TAINA
ORDER RE REQUEST TO APPEAR AT HEARING BY TELEPHONE (SMALL CLAIMS) THE REQUEST IS GRANTED.
EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED JUL-03-2017 ORDERED DESTROYED
DECLARATION OF PLAINTIFF RE: RESET TO ALLOW MORE TIME FOR SERVICE FILED BY PLAINTIFF SIMU, TAINA
TRIAL RESET TO APR-11-2017 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506 TRIAL OF FEB-07-2017 IS TAKEN OFF CALENDAR
REQUEST TO APPEAR AT HEARING BY TELEPHONE FILED BY PLAINTIFF SIMU, TAINA

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF APR-11-2017 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF APR-11-2017 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. PLAINTIFF TAINA SIMU IS PRESENT VIA COURT CALL. DEFENDANT WLLA JEAN GILMORE DBA WOMACK ACADEMY IS PRESENT. PLAINTIFF EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL; CLERK: J. MURPHY; NOT REPORTED. (506)
